parameters.name: Location parameter xi
parameters.description: Location parameter xi describing the Generalized Extreme Value distribution.

parameters.name: Scale parameter alpha
parameters.description: Scale parameter alpha describing the Generalized Extreme Value distribution.

parameters.name: First Koutsoyiannis-Parameter theta
parameters.description: First Koutsoyiannis-Parameter theta describing the Generalized Extreme Value distribution.

parameters.name: Second Koutsoyiannis-Parameter theta
parameters.description: Second Koutsoyiannis-Parameter theta describing the Generalized Extreme Value distribution.

parameters.name: Balancing parameter beta
parameters.description: Balancing parameter beta describing the Generalized Extreme Value distribution.

parameters.name: Intensity Annual Maxima Series
parameters.description: Intensity Annual Maxima Series indicating the maximum precipitation of each year for different durations.

parameters.name: Depth-Duration-Frequency
parameters.description: Depth-Duration-Frequency represents in a rain event the relation between rain depth, duration and return period (frequency).

parameters.name: Object_ID
parameters.description: Code for the object the event was selected from comprised of end date in numerical form, duration window in hours, and a running number

parameters.name: Event_ID
parameters.description: Code for event comprised of return period, selection parameter and running number

parameters.name: Start_Time
parameters.description: Start date of event

parameters.name: End_Time
parameters.description: End date of event

parameters.name: Duration
parameters.description: Duration of event

parameters.name: Area
parameters.description: Number of pixels included within event or area in 25 km²

parameters.name: RRmean
parameters.description: Mean precipitation rate within event

parameters.name: Tmean_KOSTRA
parameters.description: Mean return period of the event

parameters.name: Eta_KOSTRA
parameters.description: Extremity of event

parameters.name: RRmax
parameters.description: Maximum precipitation within the event

parameters.name: RR_Tmax
parameters.description: Precipitation rate with the maximum return period

parameters.name: Tmax_KOSTRA
parameters.description: Maximum return period within the event

parameters.name: x_center
parameters.description: Pixel number on x-axis of the event center

parameters.name: y_center
parameters.description: Pixel number on y-axis of the event center

parameters.name: lon_center
parameters.description: Longitude of the event center

parameters.name: lat_center
parameters.description: Latitude of the events center

parameters.name: x_RRmax
parameters.description: Pixel number on the x-axis of the maximum precipitation within the event

parameters.name: y_RRmax
parameters.description: Pixel number on the y-axis of the maximum precipitation within the event

parameters.name: lon_RRmax
parameters.description: Longitude of the maximum precipitation within the event

parameters.name: lat_RRmax
parameters.description: Latitude of the maximum precipitation within the event

parameters.name: MPP_flag
parameters.description: Indicator for anomalies of data, when MPP (Maximum Pixel Precipitation) was exceeded it is set to 1.
